SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst driving XRP's April 2026 surge, with the token gaining nearly 10% in the past week to around $1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1].
